title: ux-Select
text: ux-Select This section provides description for the logical UX widget ux-Select properties. ux-Select widget Table 1. Widget Summary Property Description Logical widget name: ux-Select Maps to physical widget: uxselect of type boolean Default definition: ux-Select=uxSelect() Supported triggers: onchange Use for: String fields with ValRep list Related Links uxselect The uxselect widget is a listbox control that contains a list of possible values. You can select one or more values in a uxselect widget. UX Widgets Uniface UX provides a set of widgets that are implemented using the UX Widget Interface. This set is referred as UX Widgets. The sources of these widgets are available and allow changes and/or extensions to the widgets. In a default Uniface installation, you can find the sources in the <install>\uniface\webapps\uniface\common\ux folder. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
